description: The Legacy Glowing Sphere Toggle component is a leftover Component from content migrated from other platforms. It should not be used, and should be replaced whenever possible.

fields.FadeSpeed: The speed at which the emission fades.
fields.CooldownTime: How long till the toggle can be used again between toggles.
fields.Radius: The radius of the sphere visual.
fields.GlowColor: The color of the glowing sphere visual.
fields._emissiveColor: The field to drive for the emissive color.
fields._rimColor: The field to drive for the rim color.
fields._sphereRadius: The field to drive for the sphere visual radius.
fields._sphereExtrude: The field to drive for the sphere visual extrude.
fields._colliderRadius: The field to drive for the collider radius for the visual.

usage: Not to be used, legacy content.
